title: 2021-2026 Toyota Sienna Hybrid 3rd Row Rear Seats Removal And Installation Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to removal and installation procedure of the folding back seats. These do not have airbags built into them, so no resistor bypass is required. The wire connectors that are disconnected are for the seatbelt buckle sensors for the seat belt reminder.

items.name: Automotive trim and clip removal kit
3/8" drive flex head digital torque wrench
